symptoms: Git markers <<<<<<<, =======, >>>>>>> present in active file boundaries, causing syntax and compilation failures.
rootCause: Concurrent modifications to layout, routing, or package files on divergent branches.
resolution: Apply specific resolution strategies. Accept Current for layout and routing files to preserve UI Constitution; Accept Both for packages and imports; Manual Merge for logical code blocks.
preventiveRule: Enforce automated pre-commit hook scanning for conflict markers before allowing any push.

symptoms: Next.js/Turbopack compilation halts with unclosed JSX tag or expected '</', got 'jsx text' error.
rootCause: Missing closing tag in page/layout component (e.g. missing for max-w-7xl outer container in page.tsx).
resolution: Trace opening/closing tags in source files and ensure perfect HTML/JSX balance.
preventiveRule: Run Build Sentinel type and build checks as a rigid pull-request status gate.

symptoms: Unit/smoke tests fail to run with 'TypeError: Module9Processor is not a constructor'.
rootCause: The India Country Pack was implemented under country-packs but not exported in index.ts entry point.
resolution: Add 'export * from "./india/src/module9/processor"' to packages/country-packs/src/index.ts to expose the module constructor.
preventiveRule: Enforce monorepo-wide 'pnpm --filter * test' run in Build Sentinel.

symptoms: Playwright browser automation crashes with 'Locator.is_visible: Error: strict mode violation: locator("text=NextCaseHQ") resolved to 4 elements'.
rootCause: Using generic text locators on pages with multiple brand references.
resolution: Apply '.first' or more specific locators like 'get_by_role("heading", name="NextCaseHQ")' to target the correct DOM node.
preventiveRule: Enforce web-first, unique selectors in E2E user-flow verification scripts.

symptoms: Local HEAD commit SHA diverges from the deployed Production or Vercel Preview commit SHA.
rootCause: Unpromoted commits on feature branch or delayed production release deployment sync.
resolution: Perform git pull/rebase against upstream remote and trigger release build sync.
preventiveRule: Release Sentinel audits and compares commit hashes before authorizing final delivery.
